info.name: Adavis Platform - Phase1 - V1.0
info.description: Generated from current controller mappings. Alias and legacy endpoints are intentionally excluded.

exec: pm.test('Auth response uses firstName/lastName fields', function () {
pm.test('Login context request succeeds or is absent for this user', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 201, 404]); });
pm.test('Login context payload is returned when available', function () { pm.expect(!!json?.data).to.equal(true); });
pm.test('Select plant context returns success or explicit access denial', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 201, 400]); });
pm.test('Select plant denial uses PLANT_ACCESS_DENIED', function () { pm.expect(String(json?.errorCode || '')).to.equal('PLANT_ACCESS_DENIED'); });
pm.test('Audit trails include actor events', function () { pm.expect(actorEntries.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });
pm.test('Audit trails include critical actor actions', function () {
const actorLogin = entries.find(e => ((e?.userId === actorUserId) || (e?.username === actorUserId)) && String(e?.action || '').toUpperCase() === 'LOGIN');
pm.test('Login history includes LOGIN event for actor', function () { pm.expect(!!actorLogin).to.equal(true); });
pm.test('Activate license succeeds or is already activated', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 201, 400]); });
pm.test('400 is only allowed for already activated license', function () {
pm.test('Public license response does not expose licenseKey', function () {
pm.test('SUPER_ADMIN auth succeeds for pre-license validation', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 201]); });
pm.test('Onboarding before tenant license activation is rejected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([400, 403, 404]); });

body.raw:
{
  "tenantId": "{{tenantId}}",
  "plantId": "{{plantId}}",
  "departmentCode": "{{departmentCode}}",
  "departmentName": "Operations Updated",
  "name": "Operations Updated",
  "description": "Operations department updated",
  "parentDepartmentId": null,
  "isActive": true
}

{
  "userId": "{{managedUserId}}",
  "tenantId": "{{tenantId}}",
  "email": null,
  "firstName": "Ops",
  "lastName": "User",
  "phoneNumber": "+91-9000001234",
  "title": "Production Operator",
  "empId": "EMP-{{runId}}",
  "departmentId": "{{departmentId}}",
  "isActive": true,
  "isBlocked": true,
  "isExternal": false,
  "initialPassword": "Temp@12345",
  "supportingDocuments": {{supportingDocumentsJson}},
  "supportingDocumentType": "PHYSICAL_SIGN_OFF_FORM",
  "reason": "Onboarding test"
}

exec: pm.test('Blocked user authentication is denied', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([400, 401]); });

item.name: Deactivate User For Inactive Auth Test

exec: pm.test('Inactive/deactivated user authentication is denied', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([400, 401]); });

item.name: Reactivate User After Inactive Auth Test

exec: pm.test('Managed user can authenticate after unblock/reset', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 201]); });
pm.test('Unauthorized actor cannot onboard user', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([400, 401, 403]); });
pm.test('Unauthorized actor cannot reset password', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([400, 401, 403]); });
pm.test('Select plant succeeds after assignment', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 201]); });
pm.test('Duplicate plant code is rejected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([400, 409]); });
pm.test('Modules payload is an array', function () { pm.expect(Array.isArray(entries)).to.equal(true); });
pm.test('Get modules unauthorized is rejected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([401, 403]); });
pm.test('Screens payload is an array', function () { pm.expect(Array.isArray(entries)).to.equal(true); });
pm.test('Get screens unauthorized is rejected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([401, 403]); });
pm.test('Get screens by module succeeds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 201]); });
pm.test('Features payload is an array', function () { pm.expect(Array.isArray(entries)).to.equal(true); });
pm.test('Get features unauthorized is rejected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([401, 403]); });
pm.test('Get features by screen succeeds', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 201]); });
pm.test('Permissions matrix unauthorized is rejected', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([401, 403]); });
pm.test('Create equipment master returns success', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.oneOf([200, 201]); });
pm.test('Batch summary data is an array', function () { pm.expect(Array.isArray(json?.data)).to.equal(true); });
pm.test('CPP data is an array', function () { pm.expect(Array.isArray(json?.data)).to.equal(true); });
pm.test('Alarm events report returns success', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(200); });
pm.test('Alarm events data is an array', function () { pm.expect(Array.isArray(json?.data)).to.equal(true); });
